title: Pricks 'n' Planks
description: Add more uses to the cactus!
body:
# 🌵 Pricks 'n' Planks

**Pricks 'n' Planks** is a lightweight, desert-themed Minecraft mod that introduces a full cactus wood set, complete with signs, boats, fences, and a custom pottery sherd — all designed to blend seamlessly into the vanilla experience. Whether you're expanding your desert village, building a prickly outpost, or just love green-toned builds, this mod adds just the right amount of content to feel natural, immersive, and useful without overcomplicating gameplay.

---

## 🪵 Cactus Wood Set

Pricks 'n' Planks adds a brand-new wood type made from cactus, featuring all the block types you'd expect from a full wood family:

- **Cactus Planks, Slabs, Stairs, Fences, Gates**  
- **Doors & Trapdoors with a unique cactus design**  
- **Buttons, Pressure Plates, Boats & Chest Boats**  
- **Cactus Signs and Hanging Signs**

🌿 The color palette pairs especially well with **bamboo wood**, particularly **bamboo blocks** — perfect for builders who enjoy warm, natural tones and complementary block sets.

---

## 🥣 Cactus Stew
- Brew up a bowl of **Cactus Stew**, a hearty new food that grants the custom **Thorny effect** — causing attackers to take damage, just like the *Thorns* enchantment. Great for tanks, pranksters, or anyone who likes a little passive-aggressive defense.

---

## 🏺 Desert Archaeology

- Dig deeper into the sands with a new **Cactus Pottery Sherd**, found via **archaeology at desert wells**. Combine it with other sherds to create beautifully decorated pots with a unique prickly pattern.
  
- Unearth new secrets buried in the sand! **Desert Wells** now yield the **Cactus Pottery Sherd** through archaeology — combine it with others to craft decorated pots featuring a unique cactus pattern. And if you're lucky, you might also discover the rare **Spine Armor Trim smithing template**, found in **desert wells** and **desert pyramid chests**, perfect for adding a sharp, cactus-inspired flair to your gear.

---

## 💥 Throwable Cactus & Cactus TNT

Spice up your survival gameplay with some **pointy new firepower**:

- 🌵 **Throwable Cactus** – A reusable, ranged weapon that deals a burst of prickly damage  
- 💣 **Cactus TNT** – Explodes *without terrain damage*, launching a scatter of throwable cacti in all directions — great for crowd control or desert defense!

---

## 🎵 New Music Disc – "Thorns"
A prickly, atmospheric track inspired by the desert oases. Found exclusively in **desert pyramids**, it's a fitting reward for brave explorers.

---

 ![The whole cactus set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UTGFpPcp/images/1468606d85c326dad063f56d76054238a14923e3.png)

---

## ✅ Compatibility

- ✅ **Minecraft 1.21.6+**  
- ✅ **Fabric** and **Quilt**  
- ✅ **Requires Fabric API**

---

**Add some extra bite** (and a few prickles) to your builds with **Pricks 'n' Planks** — a small but stylish expansion that gives cactus the love it deserves!
